leagues.title: Leagues

leagues.deleteLeagueDesc: Are you sure you want to delete the league "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone and all members will be removed.
leagues.leaveLeagueLastMember: You are the last person in the league "{{name}}". If you leave now, the league will be permanently deleted. Are you absolutely sure?
leagues.leaveLeagueDesc: Are you sure you want to leave the league "{{name}}"? You will be able to rejoin later if you wish.

predictions.title: My Predictions
predictions.subtitle: Fill in your predictions for the 2026 World Cup.
predictions.lockedDesc: Your predictions are locked and cannot be modified.
predictions.unlockedDesc: You can 'Save Draft' as many times as you want. Your choices will only be permanently locked when you click 'Lock Predictions' (this action can only be done once).
predictions.saveError: There was an error saving. Try again.
predictions.groupStageDesc: Drag the teams to order them from 1st to 4th place. The top two and the 8 best third-placed teams advance to the Round of 32.
predictions.specialQuestionsDesc: Please write the full name of the chosen player or team to avoid confusion in the correction.
predictions.suggestions: DO YOU HAVE IDEAS OR SUGGESTIONS FOR NEW SPECIAL QUESTIONS? FEEL FREE TO SEND THEM!
predictions.knockoutDesc: This section will be enabled once the group stage is finished.
predictions.confirmLockDesc: Once locked, you will not be able to modify them. Are you sure you want to continue?

instructions.title: Predictor Instructions
instructions.subtitle: Rules and scoring system of the tournament.
instructions.howToPlayDesc: Welcome to the World Cup Predictor. The goal of the game is to score as many points as possible by predicting the results of the group stage and answering special questions about the tournament.
instructions.step1: Go to the "My Predictions" tab to complete your predictor.
instructions.step2: In the Group Stage, you have to drag and drop the teams to order them from 1st to 4th place. The top two and the 8 best third-placed teams advance to the Round of 32.
instructions.step3: In the Special Questions, you have to write the full name of the player or team that you think will fulfill the prompt.
instructions.step4: You can "Save Draft" as many times as you want without commitment.
instructions.step5: Once you are sure of your choices, you must click "Lock Predictions". Attention! This action is final, it can only be done once and you will not be able to change your predictions afterwards.
instructions.groupScore1: For each correct final position in the group (by country)
instructions.groupScore2: For each perfect group (guessing the exact order from 1st to 4th)
instructions.knockoutScore1: For each correct guess in Who advances to Round of 32?
instructions.knockoutScore2: For each correct guess in Who advances to Round of 16?
instructions.knockoutScore3: For each correct guess in Who advances to Quarter-finals?
instructions.knockoutScore4: For each correct guess in Who advances to Semi-finals?
instructions.specialScore1: For each correct answer in the special questions
instructions.tournamentsDesc: In addition to participating in the Global Ranking against all users of the application, you can create or join Private Tournaments.
instructions.tournamentsStep1: Go to the "Leagues" tab in the Ranking to see available leagues.
instructions.tournamentsStep2: You can create a new tournament and invite your friends by sharing the link.
instructions.tournamentsStep3: Inside each tournament you will see an exclusive leaderboard with the members of that group.

worldCupBanner.timeLeft: Time remaining until the World Cup
worldCupBanner.startDate: The World Cup begins on June 11, 2026.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.p1: At World Cup Predictor, accessible via elprodedebeno.com.ar, one of our main priorities is the privacy of our visitors.
privacy.p2: By using our platform and logging in via Google, we only collect the information strictly necessary for the operation of the game:
privacy.li1: First and Last Name: To display you on the leaderboards and leagues.
privacy.li2: Email address: Used as a unique identifier for your account to securely save your predictions.
privacy.li3: Profile picture (optional): To personalize your experience on the platform.
privacy.p3: The collected information is used exclusively to:
privacy.li4: Provide, operate, and maintain our website.
privacy.li5: Identify your predictions and calculate your scores.
privacy.li6: Show your position on the leaderboards to other users.
privacy.p4: We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal information to outside parties. Your data is securely stored on Google Cloud infrastructure (Firebase), which has the highest industry security standards.
privacy.p5: By using our website and logging in, you hereby consent to our Privacy Policy and agree to its terms.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.p2: These terms and conditions outline the rules and regulations for the use of the World Cup Predictor website, located at elprodedebeno.com.ar.
terms.p3: By accessing this website we assume you accept these terms and conditions. Do not continue to use World Cup Predictor if you do not agree to take all of the terms and conditions stated on this page.
terms.p4: World Cup Predictor is a free entertainment platform based on predicting sports results. This site is not a betting platform. No real money is handled, no entry fees are charged, and no monetary prizes are awarded through the platform.
terms.p5: To participate, you must log in using a valid Google account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and for all activities that occur under it.
terms.p6: Scoring rules, deadlines for entering predictions, and tie-breaking procedures are detailed in the "Instructions" section of the site. The administrator reserves the right to modify these rules before the start of the tournament if necessary, notifying users.
terms.p7: We reserve the right to modify or discontinue, temporarily or permanently, the service with or without notice. We shall not be liable to you or to any third party for any modification, suspension, or discontinuance of the service.

results.title: Actual Results
results.description: Enter the official tournament results to calculate user scores.
results.groupStageDesc: Select the actual final order for each group.

users.title: User Management
users.description: Manage the participants of the Predictor. You can delete accounts if someone regrets playing.
users.unfixTooltip: Allow user to edit their predictions again

reports.title: Reports and Suggestions
reports.description: Review reports submitted by users. You can view attachments by clicking the links.

analytics.title: Site Statistics
analytics.description: Quick summary of activity on World Cup Predictor.
analytics.advancedDesc: To see detailed traffic data (page views, time on site, countries of origin, etc.), log in to your Vercel dashboard.

calc.title: Calculate Scores
calc.desc: Are you sure you want to calculate scores for all users based on the current results? This action will update everyone's points in the database.

reset.title: Reset Points
reset.desc: Are you sure you want to reset ALL users' points to 0? This action cannot be undone.

deleteUser.title: Delete User
deleteUser.desc: Are you sure you want to permanently delete user {{name}} and all their predictions? This action cannot be undone.

welcome.title: Welcome to
welcome.subtitle: Show your football knowledge, compete with friends and become the champion of predictions.
welcome.instructionsDesc: Before starting, we recommend reading the game rules. Here you will find how the scoring system works and what you need to win.
welcome.predictionsDesc: The heart of the game. Here you will have to predict the group stage standings and answer the special questions of the tournament.
welcome.leaguesDesc: Create private leagues to compete exclusively with your friends, family or coworkers, or join public leagues.
welcome.rankingDesc: Follow the overall leaderboard in real time. Discover who leads the global ranking and how you stand against the rest.
welcome.reportDesc: Did you find a problem or have an idea to improve the application? We want to hear from you! Please be as detailed and precise as possible in your message. If you have images or videos, you can attach them here.
welcome.reportModalDesc: Please be as detailed and precise as possible. If you have screenshots or videos, you can attach them here.
welcome.reportSuccessDesc: The admin will review it shortly.
welcome.placeholder: Describe the issue or your suggestion here...
welcome.allowedFormats: Allowed formats: Any image or video format.
welcome.orEmail: Or if you prefer, email me directly at:
welcome.storageError: Firebase Storage blocked the upload. Please check the security rules in your Firebase console.
welcome.generalError: There was an error sending the report. Check your connection and try again.

countdown.timeUpDesc: The deadline has passed. All predictions have been automatically locked.
countdown.deadline: June 7, 2026 is the last day to lock your choices.
